message:
Use actual API token counts for context pressure calculation

Replace char/4 heuristic with actual InputTokens from API responses
as the baseline for pressure calculation. After each LLM response,
RecordInputTokens stores the exact input token count and history
length. estimatePressure uses this baseline and only estimates tokens
for turns added since the measurement. Falls back to char/4 when no
measurement is available (first turn, or after compaction resets it).

This eliminates systematic estimation errors from thinking signatures,
multi-byte characters, and tokenizer differences, and fixes M4
(premature compaction from signature inflation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
